retrieved_result: Welcome to Ojai Valley Welcome to Ojai Valley Ojai Retreat & Inn is a haven of natural beauty and tranquility nestled on a five-acre hilltop with stunning panoramic views of the Ojai Valley. We offer 12 guestrooms, both in the Main House and in cottages. Most guestrooms have a private garden or patio. All rooms have a ref
